text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: This is the perfect amount of extra<n>flour!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower enters the kitchen with<n>a spring in
her step. Interested, I take<n>a peek.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the hold up! Let's get it right<n>this time!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Proceeding to the dough<n>kneading
phase.
choice_data_list: What are you both up to?
What are you both up to?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello! We're making desserts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Not just any desserts. The mission is<n>to create
sweets for a wedding.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, a good friend of mine asked me<n>for help.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're going to make desserts for<n>your sister's
wedding?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I wanted to go the extra mile for<n>her special
day! But I couldn't think of<n>any good ideas...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
I tried a bunch of different sweets, but<n>nothing
stuck. If only I were as<n>creative as you...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, if you'd like, I can try making a<n>few
desserts! They might give you<n>some ideas!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Thank you so much! I'll keep<n>
experimenting on my own too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So here we are. But I've hit a wall... I<n>don't know
what kinds of dessert are<n>suitable for a wedding.
choice_data_list: You could ask someone else for help.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Flower is currently<n>experiencing a
"deadlock." Introducing<n>an additional factor may
resolve the<n>issue.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Recalling Tracen Academy student<n>database...
Optimal match found.<n>Flash's parents are
confectioners by<n>trade.
choice_data_list:
You should rely on others more, or you'll wear
yourself out.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Sky told me something<n>similar
once.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go ask Flash for advice!<n>It might
give me some good ideas!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. One minute and twenty-three<n>seconds until
it reaches optimal<n>firmness.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Forty minutes and fifteen seconds<n>until the
dough is done baking. We'll<n>ready the
decorations in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Top it off with equal portions of<n>seasonal fruit,
then evenly apply the<n>whipped cream...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Perfection.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Your precision is incredible!<n>And the
decorations are so<n>extravagant.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Did it give you any good ideas?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No... not yet. I can't help but<n>second-guess
myself, since I'm just<n>an amateur...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When I was young, my father told me<n>that it
doesn't matter if you're a pro<n>or an amateur
when putting the<n>finishing touches on
confectionery.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
You know, baking sweets is just like<n>wishing
someone happiness.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
You can have a detailed recipe and<n>the finest
ingredients, but only when<n>you mix in your love
do you get the<n>delicious final product.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So instead of worrying about the<n>result, have
faith in the care you put in.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The care... I put in...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone's always helping me out,<n>so I want to
give back...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (That's why I jumped at thechance to be there for my friend. Ican't believe I forgot!)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Update detected in Flower's status.<n>
"Enthusiasm" parameter increasing.<n>Flash, does
this indicate...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ja. It seems like she's found her<n>answer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Some roses to decorate the financier<n>cake, and a
few African daisies on the<n>meringue... and then to
wrap it all up in<n>a bouquet of baby's breath...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There! The perfect trio of<n>flowers—love, hope, and
a wish for<n>happiness.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for the other day!<n>My friend
said her sister loved it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I made something to thank the both of<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These are the sweets bouquets you<n>devised for
Operation Wedding<n>Desserts... Are these for us?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! ♪ They're just the mini<n>versions, but
they're full of my<n>gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: They look delectable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ja... Because they were made with<n>care.
